expectations.evidence: Old skill uses verification-protocol.md in Phase 1 (combined finding+verification)

expectations.text: Phase 2 Stage A에서 finding 분석가를 shutdown해야 함
expectations.evidence: No Stage A/B. Analysts self-verify within same session.

expectations.text: Phase 2 Stage B에서 새로운 verification 세션을 spawn해야 함

expectations.evidence: No verifier sessions exist in old skill.

expectations.text: Verification 세션이 findings.json을 읽고 prism_interview를 실행해야 함
expectations.evidence: prism_interview runs in same session that wrote findings, not separate.
